case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. LONNIE PIERCE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PIERCE, LONNIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIERCE, LONNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 275 10TH STREET, #323, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
